This team never ceases to amaze me. Not only are you powering more than half of our campaign with online donations of $1, $5, or $25 -- but get this: over 100,000 people have given for the first time just in the past three weeks!

name: Rand Paul
subject: How we truly protect taxpayers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

As a Senator, I believe one of my most
important jobs is to rein in the wasteful spending in Washington.

Over these past five years, I've returned
$2.4 million to the U.S. Treasury from money that was unspent in
our office operating budget.

I've been called the most frugal lawmaker in
Congress and that's a title I'm happy to have.

Just yesterday, I sent a letter to the
Chairman of the Budget Committee, Mike Enzi and Ranking Member
Bernie Sanders, asking to include my findings from 'The Waste
Report' in the 2017 budget.

I believe the taxpayers should be protected
from waste and I will continue to do all I can to make sure they
are.

The Federal Government has racked up over $19
trillion in federal debt, over 100 percent of our nation's Gross
Domestic Product.

That comes out to over $60,000 per person
alive today.

President Obama's budget assumes $303 billion
in interest payments next year. That is almost $1,000 per person
(including children) that must be paid this year and even more
next year.

We must balance our budget and begin paying
down our debt. Our problems are real and cannot be ignored or
glossed over.

During my time in the Senate, I've proposed
three budgets that balance within 5 years.

I believe this is a critical course of action
and I'm asking for your support today to make sure these common
sense proposals continue to be put on the desks of the Budget
Committee in my next term.

We need to truly look at the role of
government and doing only what is within the Federal Government's
charge as laid out in the Constitution.

With over $19 trillion in federal debt, we
can no longer proceed with budgeting as usual in Washington.

**Gov. John Kasich is uniquely prepared and experienced to lead America and will keep us safe.**

name: Rand Paul
subject: Wake up call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Patriot,

We're almost $19 trillion in federal debt and
I think it's time we do something about it.

We need cuts.

We need reforms.

And I need to get to Washington for another
term to make sure I'm there to fight for them.

As a Senator, I believe one of my most
important jobs is to rein in the wasteful spending in Washington.

Over these past five years, I've returned
$2.4 million to the U.S. Treasury from money that was unspent in
our office operating budget. I've been labeled the "most frugal
lawmaker in Congress" and that's a title I welcome.

I'm not going to continue business as usual
with the budget. I take my responsibility to expose waste and
save taxpayer dollars very seriously.

Just yesterday, I sent a letter to the
Chairman of the Budget Committee, Mike Enzi, and Ranking Member
Bernie Sanders, asking to include my findings from 'The Waste
Report' in the 2017 budget.

We should be protected from waste. When the
government spends our money, we deserve to know exactly how it
was spent.

As it stands, the Federal Government has
racked up over $19 trillion in federal debt, over 100 percent of
our nation's Gross Domestic Product. That comes out to over
$60,000 per person alive today.

They've been spending $1000 here, and a
couple thousand there, adding up to billions wasted.

And we have to pay it back.

This is a real problem that cannot be ignored
or glossed over.

It should be a huge wake up call.

During my time in the Senate, I've proposed
three budgets that balance within 5 years. I believe this is a
critical course of action and I'm asking for your support today
to make sure these common sense proposals continue to be put on
the desks of the Budget Committee in my next term.

I will continue to fight for taxpayers for
more oversight, more transparency, and less spending.

I hope that Senators Enzi and Sanders will
take my suggestions seriously and I hope I can count on you to
stand with me today to help make sure I am elected to another
term for Kentucky this November.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

It should be a huge wake up call. During my time in the Senate, I've proposed three budgets that balance within 5 years. I believe this is a critical course of action and I'm asking for your support today to make sure these common sense proposals continue to be put on the desks of the Budget Committee in my next term. I will continue to fight for taxpayers for more oversight, more transparency, and less spending. I hope that Senators Enzi and Sanders will take my suggestions seriously and I hope I can count on you to stand with me today to help make sure I am elected to another term for Kentucky this November. body:
Friend, This is unreal. You probably saw the news that President
Obama is planning on fulfilling one of his "campaign promises."
He's planning to close Guantanamo Bay.

Friend,

This is unreal. You
probably saw the news that President Obama is planning on
fulfilling one of his "campaign promises."

He's planning to
close Guantanamo Bay.

This is truly
outrageous. Our President is willing to release terrorists and
endanger the lives of all Americans because he believes keeping
Guantanamo Bay open is "contrary to our values."

He is flat out wrong.
The fact is that GITMO is an indispensable detention facility for
radical Islamists who wanted to kill us before 9/11, who tried to
kill us on 9/11, and who will go back to trying to kill us if we
release them or bring them here.

We need a president
who will keep terrorists OUT of this country. I will be that
president.

Sign this petition
today and tell President Obama we don't need terrorists held in
American jails.

This reckless
disregard for the safety of Americans across this great nation
cannot stand. We have to stop the president's blind pursuit of
politically correct progressive ideals that are damaging our
country.

Tell President Obama and The Democrats
that this is unacceptable.

Friend, when I'm
President I will do what is necessary to keep the American people
safe. The detainees currently at Guantanamo Bay are dangerous and
hate this country and all that we stand for. We cannot allow them
to be released and step foot on our lands.

Stand with me. Let's
take this fight all the way to The White House.

Sign the petition today and fight for
what's right - fight for this country.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

subject: A Unique Contribution
body:

---

Peter, Today, I begin another 2-day 7-city tour of Pennsylvania, this time discussing my _[Plan for Securing America in the 21st Century](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197dd/3476a20e/c54f5cc/274501c2/3307317330/VEsE/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/ns-plan-final.pdf")_ , a **foreign policy document that charts a course for American national security in the modern day** - and a follow-on to my domestic issues tour from January. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197dd/3476a20e/c54f5cc/274501c1/3307317330/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0223FBb1&amounts=15,30,70,110,140,180,260")
---

In the plan, I explain how over the next few years, national security challenges will continue to grow, from defeating ISIS and handling Iran, to addressing China and halting Russian aggression, to the drought and famine caused by climate change that our military says will bring about intensified conflict and crises throughout the world.
As the most senior military officer ever elected to Congress, I've been blessed with a depth of experience that is singular among those running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania and the nation - and even in the Senate. My experience has given me an awareness that, while our military can stop a problem, it cannot fix a problem (look at Iraq, today.)
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197dd/3476a20e/c54f5cc/274501c0/3307317330/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0223FBb2&amounts=15,30,70,110,140,180,260")
---
I want to serve as a proponent of a strong national defense, but with an understanding that we best shape the world for our mutual betterment by leading with the other elements of our power - diplomatic, economic, and our ideals - without using our military unnecessarily, or unwisely. While our military is on the table, it is on the back of the table.
[Help me bring this rare experience and national security approach to the U.S. Senate by contributing $15, $30, $70, $110, or $140 today!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17197dd/3476a20e/c54f5cc/274501cf/3307317330/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0223FBp1&amounts=15,30,70,110,140,180,260")

Joe

body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
We are in the midst of a stretch where 27 states will vote or caucus as part of the Democratic primary, with over 2,000 delegates up for grabs. **It 's no exaggeration to say this is the most important stretch of our campaign.**
Secretary Clinton's supporters are responding: her campaign is holding at least a dozen high-dollar fundraisers this week, including one last night where some donors paid $27,000 to attend. And one of her Wall Street-funded super PACs has spent millions of dollars to influence a number of the upcoming primaries.
They're responding this way because we have pulled within a few points in the national polls and ended up winning the Latino vote in Nevada. If we can keep it up, we are going to win. But we can't stop. Not now. Not when we are so close and with so much on the line. That's why I need to ask all of my supporters today:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3 to our political revolution? Supporters like you are stepping up in record numbers, and if you add your contribution today, we are going to win this election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/moving-forward-together?refcode=em160223v1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/moving-forward-together?refcode=em160223v1-full")
Yes, Wall Street has enormous economic and political power. Yes, Wall Street has made HUGE contributions to the Clinton campaign and their super PACs. Yes, they have an endless surplus of money.
But we have something they don't have. And that is millions of working families standing together and demanding change. If we keep moving forward together, we are going to win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Sisters and Brothers - We are in the midst of a stretch where 27 states will vote or caucus as part of the Democratic primary, with over 2,000 delegates up for grabs. It 's no exaggeration to say this is the most important stretch of our campaign. Secretary Clinton's supporters are responding: her campaign is holding at least a dozen high-dollar fundraisers this week, including one last night where some donors paid $27,000 to attend. And one of her Wall Street-funded super PACs has spent millions of dollars to influence a number of the upcoming primaries. They're responding this way because we have pulled within a few points in the national polls and ended up winning the Latino vote in Nevada. If we can keep it up, we are going to win. But we can't stop. Not now. Not when we are so close and with so much on the line. That's why I need to ask all of my supporters today: "" Yes, Wall Street has enormous economic and political power. Yes, Wall Street has made HUGE contributions to the Clinton campaign and their super PACs. Yes, they have an endless surplus of money. But we have something they don't have. And that is millions of working families standing together and demanding change. If we keep moving forward together, we are going to win. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

Peter,
Today, I filed as a Republican candidate for Governor. Our mission to turn around Missouri officially starts today.
[](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabald8omDaWKxN1B-2Bh1Zs7A4qeUmkHT4mMmiibRQ-2FVYsTALO8qbBWaPxVWskiTwYbVWg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23zgYzqcreXOVA-2FcgrGBQmegwcgrl5hfWl3I2KFxlVS7CumXzvoNiUXO3YE2Qzn32iZdiFx5ubPCMCY-2BV2Wy0bl3S1YVepWb6Q6ovaMNcjrv2Q41T0Na5fPzCKC7I9gtp9vPxQ9swI-2F-2BR9ONEU8suI9ru7UggBcrjTH4MYkEsuo3c1-2ByuO8wHxG80JhY88rvD6R7TDG-2F6-2BM11iQpdjXiF-2FZ-2BDoR1G3XwqwlA-2Bw5uqyop5cECctW-2BLI9KFWrkYUhtge2lQyMspTpfwu9CRJ-2BeXuv2zsF6DaqMeGxDwjCzPSNjT0rYzxUZVDVlctJ7WZ1Ab2btRm8ZZBxxlnBODCWEb4FsKZGR0SCcRzcTq1wfrZN-2FGhs14ippvNP8rNc1jiO51rZPg1GcrECUp-2B2xn6vJHST-2FUuDU7DGM1XQXjByHj2IIsg-3D-3D)
I'm the only person in this race who has never run for political office. I'm not running to play the politicians' games. I'm running to get real results for real people.
The hard truth is that our government is broken. It is no longer government for the people, it has become government for the politicians. My boxing coach always said, "if you want different, do different." And if we want a different result from our government, then we are going to have to take different action. We can't trust the same politicians who got us into this mess to get us out of it. If the insiders were going to make a difference, wouldn't they have done it already?
I've met thousands of Missourians who share our frustration with politics as usual, but who also share our belief that with the right leadership, our best days are still ahead. Every day, new people come forward to work with us, to sweat beside us, and to help us win this race. Every day, people go out and tell their friends and neighbors that in this race we no longer have to settle for the same old tired, fake, fading leadership. Every day, people let their friends know that in this race, we can dedicate ourselves to a higher purpose, and we can serve a mission greater than ourselves.
Unlike politicians who will promise you things, I'm here to ask something of you: [I'm asking you to join us on this mission.](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabavW21didZYEHPbXe0LggHhA5kZrL6Kiw1V2yVMqo-2Bdbl_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23zgYzqcreXOVA-2FcgrGBQmegwcgrl5hfWl3I2KFxlVS7CumXzvoNiUXO3YE2Qzn32iZdiFx5ubPCMCY-2BV2Wy0bl3S1YVepWb6Q6ovaMNcjrv2Q41T0Na5fPzCKC7I9gtp9vPxQ9swI-2F-2BR9ONEU8suI9ru7UggBcrjTH4MYkEsuo3c1-2ByuO8wHxG80JhY88rvD6R7TDG-2F6-2BM11iQpdjXiF-2FZ-2B5gS4f76-2Fipm9xiQWt-2FN1TendofnCslTeH7mVrSncvTKY-2BL8122cyfdHRoIfH2r9NjU5-2BI5QbOaZZJeUXh1OxZ2HMvr-2Bm8XA9SzVbDNIZxgcQDV80XgJ3OVv9c83o1Hxfvn-2FJL4cUqCwJkjo-2FbgGuZIp-2F2hy2tgJJ0-2F6O-2BJo15lprggQRNd4ifxh2oBF3LkYrLMnfpj8voF7EEWlqhlO0IA-3D-3D) Lead with us. This team knows no one is more ready or capable than Hillary to take on the Republicans who will rip away all the progress President Obama has accomplished. Hillary can and will take on the fights we care about.

body:
#
There are some numbers I think are very important for you to know, sisters and brothers:
* **27 states and territories** have their primaries and caucuses in the next several weeks, starting last weekend.

* Last night, the Clinton campaign held a fundraiser where some **high-dollar donors bundled $27,000.**

* The average contribution to our campaign is **just $27.**

I think you know what I'm about to ask you to do.
[**Please contribute $27 to our political revolution so we can show the billionaire class that they can't have it all.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-dollars?refcode=em160223full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-dollars?refcode=em160223full")
**[Contribute $27](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-dollars?refcode=em160223full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-dollars?refcode=em160223full")**
Some other very important numbers you should know about: the last month has been very good for our political revolution. Nearly 600,000 people have contributed to our campaign since we came to a virtual tie in Iowa. Half of them did so for the very first time.
The polls are tightening. We're bringing in new voters - and contributors - to the political process. And we have a very good chance to win the Democratic nomination and the White House.
This is only possible because millions of people like you are stepping up to be a part of our movement. But we can't stop now.
[**Make a contribution of $27 - the average donation to our campaign - before a critical week of voting begins on Saturday.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-dollars?refcode=em160223full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-dollars?refcode=em160223full")
Thank you.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
